# LookerAssets

Wraps `dagster-looker`'s LookerResource to surface Looker explores, dashboards, and looks as Dagster external assets. Combine with a warehouse asset graph for full lineage from raw tables → LookML → dashboards.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `base_url` | `str` | Looker instance base URL (e.g. 'https://mycompany.looker.com'). |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `client_id_env_var` | `str` | `"LOOKER_CLIENT_ID"` | Env var with API3 client_id. |
| `client_secret_env_var` | `str` | `"LOOKER_CLIENT_SECRET"` | Env var with API3 client_secret. |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `project` | `str` | — | Optional LookML project filter. |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example YAML
```yaml
type: dagster_component_templates.LookerAssetsComponent
attributes:
  base_url: <fill in>
  client_id_env_var: <fill in>
  client_secret_env_var: <fill in>
  project: <fill in>
```

## Requirements

```
dagster
dagster-looker
```
